settings.heading: Where is it made?
settings.content: Using Nano-Crystalline technology, Bleame™ Crystal Hair Eraser allows the hair to clump and break from the surface when rubbed gently on the skin. This process also helps exfoliate, revealing baby smooth skin after use 💜

settings.heading: Instructions
settings.content:
Prep Your Skin

Exfoliate your skin no less than 24 hours before use. If you have sensitive skin, exfoliate no less than 48 hours before use.

Patch Test for Sensitivity

Conduct a patch test on a small area of each leg: one with damp skin and the other with dry skin. Test with moisture barriers like hypoallergenic moisturizer or cream. Allow it to fully absorb before using your Eraser. For added comfort, test with a protective layer of shaving gel or cream.

Get to action

After a successful patch test, treat your desired areas using the method and technique that felt most comfortable during testing. Start with gentle, circular motions and light pressure. Adjust your technique as needed, avoiding excessive pressure that may cause irritation. Take breaks between passes and use shorter strokes to minimize friction and heat.

Aftercare for Soothing Relief

Rinse the treated area with cool water and gently pat it dry, avoiding rubbing. Apply a fragrance-free, hypoallergenic moisturizer. For an extra relief, use a cold compress for 10-15 minutes.

Caring for Your Eraser

After each use, rinse your Crystal Hair Eraser under running water to remove hair and exfoliated skin. Store the eraser in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and humidity.
Important Note: If you experience any discomfort or irritation during or after use, discontinue use immediately. Visit our Help Center for more information.

settings.heading: Description
settings.content:
Introducing Slippery Box , a natural solution for female dryness and discomfort. Formulated with the Ulmus Rubra (slippery elm) herb, this oral supplement offers a gentle and effective way to enhance intimate moisture and maintain overall feminine health. Perfect for women seeking a natural supplement, our vegetable-based capsules are designed to support your intimate wellness & boost confidence.

Key Features:

 Natural Moisturizer: slippery box when ingested forms a protective coating on mucous membranes, including those in the vagina, to provide effective moisture to alleviate  dryness.

Gentle Wellness Support: Designed to harmonize with your body's natural rhythm, our capsules provide a non-invasive option for enhancing personal wellness

Convenient and Easy to Use: Simple daily supplement for continuous support.

Non-GMO and Gluten-Free: Safe and suitable for various dietary needs.

 

Slippery Box Benefits & Uses:

 

Increase wetness: due to menopause, hormone changes, or any other reasons.

settings.heading: How To Use?
settings.content:
Suggested Use: Take (1) capsule by MOUTH twice a day. In other words, take two a day. Take one in the AM & one in the PM. Take with a full glass of water. Your body must be hydrated for the best results, so please drink water

Important Information:
-Do not use if pregnant or nursing.
- * These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
-Consult a doctor before use.
- Keep out of reach of children.
- Our product is safety heat sealed for your protection. Please do not use if the seal is missing or broken.

settings.heading: Slippery Box Ingredients
settings.content:
Ulmus Rubra (600 mg): The primary ingredient is derived from the bark of slippery elm trees, known for its mucilage content, which forms a gel-like substance when mixed with water.

60 vegan capsules

settings.heading: Return & Refund Policy
settings.content:
1.1 Return Due To Change Of Mind

Evoq will happily accept returns due to change of mind as long as a request to return is received by us within 72 hours of receipt of item. 

Once approved, refunds will be processed to their original payment method. We will notify you once this has been completed through email.

Evoq will refund the value of the goods returned but will NOT refund the value of any shipping paid.

1.2 Cancellations

If you change your mind before a tracking numbers has been generated, we are able to accept cancellations at any time before the order has been dispatched. If an order has already been dispatched, please refer to our refund policy.

settings.faq-ques: What are Slippery Box Moisture Capsules?
settings.faq-content: They are oral supplements made with pure slippery elm bark designed to support natural vaginal moisture and soothe dryness from within.

settings.faq-ques: How do I use these capsules?
settings.faq-content: Take one capsule twice daily with a full glass of water—once in the morning and once at night is ideal.

settings.faq-ques: How soon will I see results?
settings.faq-content: Many users report noticeable improvement within 2 weeks, but results can vary from person to person.

settings.faq-ques: Are these capsules safe to use?
settings.faq-content: Generally, yes. They are made from natural ingredients, vegan-friendly, non-GMO, and gluten-free. However, consult your doctor if you are pregnant, breastfeeding, or have medical conditions.

settings.faq-ques: Can I use this product if I’m pregnant or nursing?
settings.faq-content: It’s best to consult your healthcare provider before using this or any supplement during pregnancy or breastfeeding.
